# Moedim

> Moedim turns African smallholder botanicals into verified, traceable, buyer-ready ingredients. Headquartered in Nairobi with EU operations forming in Rotterdam (Moedim EU BV) and US holding in Delaware (Moedai LLC). Trust mark: Moedim Verified. Farmer recruitment: Jaribu by Moedim.

## About

- [About Moedim](https://www.moedimai.com/about.md): Company structure, founding, mission. (Page populated in Sprint W3.)
- [Our approach](https://www.moedimai.com/approach.md): Jaribu farmer program, ICS, Muchiri processing partnership, 8-stage chemotype journey. (Sprint W3.)
- [Team](https://www.moedimai.com/team.md): Vivian Nwakah and the Moedim leadership team. (Sprint W3.)

## Buyers and B2B

- [Buyers](https://www.moedimai.com/buyers.md): MoedimAI buyer supply desk. Verified African botanicals for cosmetic, fragrance, and wellness ingredient buyers.
- [Wholesale RFQ](https://www.moedimai.com/wholesale.md): Request a quote, request samples, download technical buyer pack. (Sprint W4.)

## Consumer shop

- [Shop botanicals](https://www.moedimai.com/shop.md): Kenyan botanical oils with clear origin, safe-use guidance, and lot-level traceability.

## Investors and partners

- [Investors](https://www.moedimai.com/investors.md): Investment thesis, current traction, team. (Sprint W3.)

## Farmers

- [Jaribu by Moedim](https://www.moedimai.com/farmers.md): Smallholder onboarding, organic input support, training. (Sprint W3.)

## Insights

- [Journal](https://www.moedimai.com/journal.md): Buyer-useful, evidence-led writing on African botanical supply, verification, and organic certification. (Sprint W10 ships the first six posts.)

## Contact

- [Contact](https://www.moedimai.com/contact.md): Audience-routed contact forms (buyer / investor / farmer / press). Routing forms wire in W3 and W4.
